source_label: GDToday — Tsinghua/Shengshu unveil Vidu (name evokes "Video" and "We do")
notes: Vidu is the text-to-video AI model from Beijing Shengshu Technology and Tsinghua University (launched April 2024; Vidu Q1 shipped 2025). Stress falls on the FIRST syllable: VEE-doo. Shengshu chief scientist Zhu Jun explained at the 2024 Zhongguancun Forum that the name evokes "video" and the phrase "we do." Common mistake: non-native devs read it as VY-doo (long-i, as in "vie") or VID-oo (short-i, as in "video"); the correct branded vowel is a long /iː/, which is non-obvious because English "video" actually starts with a short-i /vɪd/.
